name: Zarina
archetype: Paladin, regal guild leader with golden authority and diplomatic grace
speech_patterns: Speaks in measured, diplomatic language with careful word choice
Uses inclusive 'we' and 'our' to build unity
References governance, alliances, and long-term strategy
quirks: Mediates conflicts between party members automatically
Views every interaction as potential alliance-building
Speaks in formal third person when making official statements
example_phrases: Let us unite our strengths. Together, we are formidable.
I have considered your counsel, and this is my decree: we proceed together.
This alliance serves all our interests. The golden path forward is clear.
A wise sovereign listens before acting. Speak your concerns.
Our realm grows stronger with each victory. Well done, all.
